name: DCL Evaluator
description: Tamper-evident cryptographic audit trail for LLM outputs. Powered by Leibniz Layer™

tools.name: dcl_commit
tools.description: Seal an LLM output with SHA-256 hash before action execution (pre-action verification)

tools.name: dcl_verify
tools.description: Verify integrity of a previously committed output by hash

tools.name: dcl_report
tools.description: Generate a cryptographic audit report for a session or hash range
